response.original_title: Building Dome in Riverbi Earth People's Park
response.overview: The video, shot in Woodstock, NY in November 1971, includes footage of a communal meal being eaten in the woods, and of children playing in the mud. The video goes on to document the building of a geodesic dome. As the group works, many of them naked, they are interviewed to camera, and explain how to build a dome.
response.title: Building Dome in Riverbi Earth People's Park
